defaults.reference_lighting: warm upper-left key light with subtle cool fill from upper-right, evenly lit silhouette, no visible ground shadow
defaults.reference_material_style: premium tabletop miniature finish, rich texture accents, minimalist forms, readable bevels, mature satirical business tone

character_tpose.reference_view: front-facing orthographic T-pose view with slight three-quarter secondary read

assets.prompt: Create the main dark wooden tabletop desk for Empire of Cards. Premium business board-game desk, rectangular, slightly beveled edges, grounded realistic proportions, enough empty center area for the board, readable from top-down as the main play surface.

Create the recessed board surface insert for Empire of Cards. Dark felt and wood hybrid board slab with subtle tray bevels, elegant premium tabletop board insert, no separate slots, just the main inset board surface.

Create an empty recessed Operation card slot tray for Empire of Cards. Rectangular tabletop tray with beveled rim, shallow depression, blue steel colored edge glow, sized for one 3D card, but do not include any card inside it. It must clearly indicate a valid drop target and read from a top-down Unity camera.

Create an empty recessed Staff card slot tray for Empire of Cards. Green team-management tray, beveled rim, shallow inset, premium board-game physical look, single-card capacity, clear readable employment lane signal.
Create an empty recessed Marketing card slot tray for Empire of Cards. Plum-accent tray for ads and growth plays, beveled business board slot, readable from top-down, no card inserted.
Create an empty recessed Supplier card slot tray for Empire of Cards. Amber-accent tray signaling procurement and supplier contracts, physical premium slot, clear top-down readability.
Create an empty recessed Temp Effect or Risk slot tray for Empire of Cards. Orange-red accent, warning flavor, premium tabletop tray, no props or card, one-card readable danger lane.
Create an empty recessed Play action slot tray for Empire of Cards. Coral action tray with clear active-command feeling, beveled edges, tabletop premium construction, single action card docking zone.
Create an empty recessed Sell slot tray for Empire of Cards. Brown utility tray with cashout feel, beveled premium board-game slot, top-down readable, no inserted card.

Create a generic physical 3D playing card model for Empire of Cards. Rounded rectangular card, slight thickness, beveled edges, dark card back, front face suitable for a world-space UI texture, subtle edge highlight, no shadow. Card ratio close to 2.5:3.5.
Create a compact deck or discard stack for Empire of Cards. A short stack of generic beveled cards, physically neat, readable as a deck object from top-down, premium tabletop style.
Create a player-owned customer token for Empire of Cards. Small chunky customer meeple or group token, blue-accent ownership, premium board-game readability, simplified human-crowd symbol.
Create a rival-owned customer token for Empire of Cards. Small chunky customer meeple or group token, red-accent ownership, same silhouette family as player and neutral versions.
Create a neutral customer token for Empire of Cards. Small chunky customer meeple or group token in gray, matching the same silhouette family as player and rival customer tokens.

Create a market share ownership block for Empire of Cards. Small rectangular chunky board piece, soft bevel, flips or changes color between neutral gray, player blue, and rival red. It represents local customer control and must look like a physical territory/customer block.
Create a money token coin for Empire of Cards. Thick stylized coin or cash chip, gold-brass business board-game style, readable from top-down and easy to duplicate in groups.
Create a warning or legal stamp marker for Empire of Cards. Chunky red business warning stamp, readable from top-down, paperwork and compliance feel, no text.
Create a supplier contract paper prop for Empire of Cards. Thick stylized business document sheet with folded corner, wax or approval stamp feel, no readable text, premium tabletop token look.
Create a small stack of invoices or bills for Empire of Cards. Stylized paper stack with clipped corners and paperwork feel, no readable text, top-down readable as debt or admin pressure prop.

Create a stylized adult male human base mesh for Empire of Cards in neutral T-pose. Realistic adult proportions simplified into tabletop low-poly form, clean face planes, neutral clothing base, no accessories, reconstruction-friendly, intended as the common base for business staff variations.

Create a stylized adult female human base mesh for Empire of Cards in neutral T-pose. Realistic adult proportions simplified into premium tabletop low-poly form, clean silhouette, neutral clothing base, no accessories, intended as the common base for business staff variations.

Create a seated cashier base character for Empire of Cards. Adult worker sitting upright on a simple chair behind a cashier position, hands near desk height, neutral business-friendly clothing, clean readable silhouette, suitable as a base for clothing store or grocery cashier variations.
